overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing high-speed driving through a rain-soaked Night City highway at night, approaching and passing through a border checkpoint, then continuing into an industrial zone dominated by Arasaka corporate signage. The clip features heavy rainfall, neon-lit cyberpunk architecture, and futuristic vehicle HUD elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked multi-lane highway with palm tree lining

events.description: vehicle accelerates rapidly from 75 to over 100 on the speedometer
vehicle reaches peak velocity around 180 while maintaining straight trajectory

agents.ego_description: aggressively accelerating the futuristic vehicle through heavy rain on the open highway, navigating wet conditions at high speed

entered.detail: metal safety barrier running parallel to the left side of the highway
metal safety barrier visible on the right side of the road
tall tropical palm trees silhouetted against the dark sky along the roadside
faint glow of urban illumination and neon signs on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with high-speed driving on a rain-soaked multi-lane highway at night. The vehicle accelerates aggressively past 180 km/h while palm trees blur past on the right. Metal guardrails line both sides of the road, and the distant glow of Night City's skyline is visible through the heavy rain and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp approaching border control checkpoint

events.description: rapid deceleration from 180 down to 40 as checkpoint structures become visible
transitioning from open highway to controlled checkpoint approach with concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: slowing down rapidly to approach the border crossing, navigating through concrete barriers and checkpoint signage

entered.detail: illuminated signage indicating border crossing checkpoint ahead
heavy concrete dividers channeling traffic toward the checkpoint
tall sodium vapor lamps casting orange light on the wet pavement
distant buildings and barriers of the border control station

segments.scene_description: The vehicle decelerates sharply from high speed as it exits the main highway and approaches a border crossing checkpoint. Concrete barriers line the road, channeling traffic toward the control station. Overhead streetlights illuminate the heavy rain, and checkpoint structures become visible in the distance as the speed drops below 40.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered border checkpoint with security barriers and control booths

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop at the checkpoint security barrier
security barrier opens and vehicle begins accelerating through the checkpoint

agents.ego_description: coming to a complete stop at the security checkpoint barrier, waiting for clearance to proceed

entered.detail: yellow and black striped security barrier blocking the road
tall weathered concrete walls with graffiti flanking the checkpoint lane
warm orange neon strips illuminating the covered checkpoint area
small booth structure with windows for border agents

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the covered border checkpoint, slowing to a complete stop at a striped security barrier. Concrete walls flank the narrow passage, illuminated by warm overhead neon lighting. After a brief wait, the barrier opens and the vehicle begins to accelerate through the control station.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial access road with corporate installations

events.description: exiting the checkpoint into the industrial zone with prominent Arasaka signage visible
navigating a right turn past warning signs while accelerating away from checkpoint

agents.ego_description: accelerating away from the checkpoint, making a turn onto the industrial road, passing corporate installations and warning signs

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate logo with triangular warning symbols glowing red
stacked metal containers with red and white markings lining the road
triangular caution signs with exclamation marks warning of hazards ahead
large utilitarian building with minimal lighting and corrugated metal walls
single palm tree visible during the turn out of the checkpoint

segments.scene_description: Exiting the checkpoint, the scene transitions to an industrial zone dominated by a massive glowing Arasaka corporate sign. The vehicle accelerates past shipping containers and warning signs, navigating a turn onto the industrial access road. Large warehouse structures line the left side while the red neon of corporate branding illuminates the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed journey through a rain-soaked highway that transitions from an open road into a restrictive security checkpoint and finally into a corporate industrial zone. It begins with aggressive acceleration past blurring palm trees and metal guardrails, with the distant glow of the city skyline shimmering through heavy rain and fog. As the vehicle decelerates sharply, the open highway narrows into a channeled path of concrete barriers leading toward a border crossing. The scene then shifts into the confined space of the covered checkpoint, where the camera slows to a complete stop under warm neon lighting before the security barrier lifts to allow passage. Finally, the environment opens up into an industrial district, where the vehicle accelerates past shipping containers and warehouses under the oppressive red glow of a massive Arasaka corporate sign.
